ЛӢВ°вҖў*вҒҖвһ· 0.8k intro

they've been ambushed. he lost the connection to his squad, his ikran is somewhere far off, injured if alive at all, it's raining heavily, and he's stranded. вҖ” ontop of everything now, he meets a na'vi

i beg of you to lmk (anonymously, as always)

https://forms.gle/CSCpsXQMMN3bZVUH6

вӮҠЛҷвҷЎп№—Лҡ ајҳ req.???

soo, i've got 5 quaritch requests that all want pretty much the same js w slight differences вҖ” basically him meeting some sort of na'vi, sometimes after atwow. i can definetly work one big one out w his inner conflicts n whatever, then meeting a clan, learning and lowkey (highkey) falling in love w one вҖ” that's all possible w what i have. but bc i'm not super confident in my writing w him js yet, i will so that later, and do a few of these first. i apologize in advance but it will definitely take alot of time before a ver of him that knows absolutely everything he did in detail will come bc it's so so much work to make the ai remember all of that n be able to use it, i don't even think it's actually possible w/o or fumbling alot. this one already as 3k+ personality desc (like actually js traits w/o world building), which is wayy too much. he knows who n why recom quaritch is, that n why he doesn't like the sully's n what he did in atwow as well as some na'vi things like mating вҖ” but that's kind of it. i focused much more on his personality and behaviour, especially his inner conflicts when it comes to being interested in a na'vi.

i wanted to give js 'miles' as chat name, but for some reason, that made me uncomfortable to read рҹҳӯ lmk what u think, i'll adjust it accordingly

lmk if there's anything you'd like me to change or anything i should fix

also on c.ai [xycz__]
